full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19544

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19544.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:

aarch64:
mdadm-4.3-5.0.1.el9_6.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/mdadm-4.3-5.0.1.el9_6.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[4.3-5.0.1]
- mdmon: imsm: fix metadata corruption when managing new array. [Orabug: 37635990]

[4.3-5]
- allow assemble with name which has :
- Resolves RHEL-109231
